creator: rezo@live.cn
text:
Created attachment 190935
output of make MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes install clean

My uname -a:
FreeBSD GIEPHER-PHP 11.0-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p4 #0 r309666: Thu Dec  8 17:44:40 CST 2016     giepher@GIEPHER-PHP:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GIEPHER_PHP_DEBUG  amd64

Emacs: emacs-25.3_3,3

It reported a error and stoped when I upgraded emacs from ports.
set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes was no working.

error info:
alloc.o: In function `Fmemory_info':
alloc.c:(.text+0x3a58): undefined reference to `sysinfo'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:596: temacs] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/editors/emacs/work-full/emacs-25.3/src'
